rationale: Duplicate of S-0003-01 (FrontierMath access negotiation). Both suggestions cover the same external-data acquisition step — keep S-0003-01 as the canonical record because it sits in the benchmark-download task that owns the access decision; reject S-0002-04 to clear the duplicate from the high-priority backlog. Reversible via a future correction if the access-negotiation framing diverges from S-0003-01.
